text:
Created attachment 148544
Poudriere Build Log for misc/mdp 0.92.1

Here is the Poudriere build log for misc/mdp 0.92.1. I accidently re-uploaded the diff file thinking it was the build log. The so-called "build log" which is actually a re-upload of the patch also has a typo in it's description (it should be 0.92.1 instead of 0.91.2).
